title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush
summary: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is an upcoming 2026 racing game from the developers behind Hot Wheels Unleashed & Hot Wheels Unleashed 2: Turbocharged. Developed and published by Milestone S.r.l., the game is set to be released on 10 September 2026, for the Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2 and Microsoft Windows.

title: List of 2026 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary: For 2026, the Hot Wheels mainline is numbered 1 through 250 with color variations not receiving a new number. Treasure Hunts and store exclusives are numbered. For the listing by series see List of 2026 Hot Wheels.

title: G-Machines
summary: 200px|rightG-Machines were a series 1:50 scale premium cars released from 2006 - 2008. The line emphasized bold, aggressive styling with exaggerated proportions, reminiscent of the 'Tooned series.

title: Custom Classics
summary: 200px|rightThe Custom Classics line was first released in 2007. The line featured models in the 1/50 scale that were highly detailed. All models came with rubber wheels that had treads.

title: Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series (2012)
summary: The Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series was released exclusively at Target stores in 2012. All castings in this series are all 2011 and 2012 mainline releases on a specially designed card by the picks of the four driver teams. Each vehicle comes with a sticker sheet consisting of the Team Hot Wheels logo and the team color icon.
